_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.
_publications._context: K562 (a chronic myelogenous leukemia cell line, used as target cells) were maintained in RPMI1640 | Assembled TALENs were tested by transient transfection into K562 cells using the NEON electroporation system
